name: Mining
description: Extraction of ores and minerals from underground deposits.

name: Quarrying
description: Surface extraction of stone and mineral deposits from open pits.

name: Logging
description: Harvesting timber from forests for industrial and construction use.

name: Agriculture
description: Cultivation and harvesting of crops and plant-based raw materials.

name: Animal Husbandry
description: Raising livestock to produce animal-based raw materials such as wool.

name: Smelting
description: Extracting metal from ore using high-temperature furnaces.

name: Coking
description: Heating coal in the absence of air to produce coke for metallurgy.

name: Casting
description: Forming metal parts by pouring molten metal into molds.

name: Rolling
description: Shaping metal into beams, rails, and sheets using rolling mills.

name: Forging
description: Shaping heated metal using hammers or presses.

name: Machining
description: Precision cutting and shaping of metal parts using machine tools.

name: Assembly
description: Combining manufactured parts into finished mechanical products.

name: Electrical Assembly
description: Assembly of electrical and electromechanical equipment and systems.

name: Glassmaking
description: Producing glass goods by melting silica and forming it into products.

name: Spinning
description: Transforming raw fibers such as cotton, wool, or flax into yarn.

name: Textile Processing
description: Manufacturing textiles by weaving or knitting yarn into fabric.

name: Papermaking
description: Producing paper from wood pulp and other plant fibers.

name: Rope Making
description: Twisting plant fibers into rope and cordage.

name: Chemical Processing
description: Industrial production and treatment of bulk chemical materials.

name: Chemical Synthesis
description: Creation of new chemical compounds through controlled reactions.

name: Food Processing
description: Industrial preparation and preservation of food products.
